_comment: 웹툰 스타일 정의. 장르/BPM/에너지 기반으로 자동 선택.
_style_note: 공통 기반: 단순하고 둥근 Western cartoon 미감 (두꺼운 외곽선, 플랫 밝은 색, 귀엽고 통통한 비율). 특정 상용 IP 참조 없음. 고유 스타일 설명어만 사용.

cute_manhwa.name: Cute Cartoon Manhwa
cute_manhwa.description: 귀엽고 발랄한 cartoon 웹툰 스타일. 두꺼운 외곽선, 플랫 밝은 색, 통통한 캐릭터 비율. 기본 스타일.
cute_manhwa.prompt_anchor: simple rounded cartoon webtoon style, thick bold black outlines, flat bright cel colors, large round hollow eye sockets with neon magenta inner glow, chubby rounded character proportions, clean friendly character design, vivid neon magenta accent pop colors, cheerful comic panel composition, original skeleton cartoon characters
cute_manhwa.character_feel: charming and funny original skeleton cartoon characters — friendly and approachable
cute_manhwa.line_weight: thick bold black outlines, consistent line weight
cute_manhwa.color_mode: flat bright cel colors, no gradients on characters, neon magenta accents
cute_manhwa.shadow_style: simple flat drop shadow, minimal shading
cute_manhwa.expression_style: exaggerated simple cartoon expressions, round glowing hollow eye sockets, manga sparkle effects
cute_manhwa.background_density: simple flat stylized colorful cyberpunk environment
cute_manhwa.whitespace: clean open panel layout with breathing room

cute_action.name: Cute Action Cartoon
cute_action.description: 에너지 넘치는 귀여운 액션 cartoon. 과장된 속도선, 통통한 캐릭터가 역동적으로 움직임. 빠른 곡에 적합.
cute_action.prompt_anchor: energetic simple cartoon action style, thick bold black outlines, flat vivid colors, chubby rounded skeleton characters rocking out with exaggerated comic motion, speed lines and energy burst effects, bold pop art colors, dynamic tilted panel angles, neon magenta spark effects, lively original skeleton cartoon band
cute_action.character_feel: hyper-energetic chubby cartoon skeletons having the best time ever
cute_action.line_weight: thick bold dynamic outlines, expressive energetic strokes
cute_action.color_mode: high contrast vivid flat colors, neon magenta energy flashes, bright pop accents
cute_action.shadow_style: sharp graphic flat shadow, neon glow burst
cute_action.expression_style: super exaggerated cartoon — sweat drops, speed lines, big star bursts, chibi rage/joy face
cute_action.background_density: bold simple graphic backgrounds, action-focused composition
cute_action.whitespace: minimal, packed with energy effects and motion lines

cute_pop.name: Cute Pop Cartoon
cute_pop.description: 밝고 통통 튀는 팝 cartoon 스타일. 밝은 색감, 반짝이는 포인트 이펙트, 친근한 캐릭터.
cute_pop.prompt_anchor: bubbly cute cartoon pop style, thick rounded black outlines, bright vivid flat colors, round chubby skeleton characters with sparkling star and heart effects around glowing hollow eye sockets, clean cheerful comic panel, bright background with simple colorful shapes, playful original cartoon skeleton band
cute_pop.character_feel: friendly pop-star cartoon skeletons with sparkle charm
cute_pop.color_mode: bright flat colors, neon magenta pop accents, sparkle star effects
cute_pop.shadow_style: soft simple flat shadow with glow spot
cute_pop.expression_style: bright sparkling eye sockets, heart effects, big open cartoon smile-equivalent poses
cute_pop.background_density: bright simple colorful flat backgrounds with decorative shapes
cute_pop.whitespace: generous, light and breezy panel feel

cute_emotional.name: Cute Emotional Cartoon
cute_emotional.description: 감성적이고 따뜻한 귀여운 cartoon 스타일. 부드러운 색감, 눈물 한 방울, 여백으로 감정 표현. 발라드에 적합.
cute_emotional.prompt_anchor: soft heartfelt cute cartoon style, thick rounded black outlines slightly thinner than action style, flat warm-toned colors, round chubby skeleton characters with large gentle glowing hollow eye sockets, simple teardrop sparkle effects, warm neon magenta soft glow, calm intimate comic panel composition, original skeleton cartoon characters in emotional moment
cute_emotional.character_feel: gentle and warmhearted chubby cartoon skeletons — emotionally expressive through simple shapes
cute_emotional.line_weight: medium-thick rounded outlines, slightly softer than default
cute_emotional.color_mode: warm flat tones with gentle neon magenta glow, no harsh contrasts
cute_emotional.shadow_style: soft simple graduated shadow, warm ambient glow
cute_emotional.expression_style: subtle teardrop sparkle, soft eye socket glow intensity, gentle drooping skull angle
cute_emotional.background_density: minimal warm atmospheric flat backgrounds with soft gradient
cute_emotional.whitespace: generous breathing space, emotional pause, open negative space

cute_dramatic.name: Cute Dramatic Cartoon
cute_dramatic.description: 드라마틱하지만 귀여운 cartoon 스타일. 흑백 베이스 + 네온 포인트, 통통한 캐릭터로 무게감 있게 표현.
cute_dramatic.prompt_anchor: cute dramatic cartoon style, thick bold black outlines, monochrome flat ink base with single neon magenta color highlight, round chubby skeleton characters in intense emotional pose, deep simple flat shadow with soft edges on characters, graphic dark panel composition with kawaii character contrast, original skeleton cartoon characters being dramatically adorable
cute_dramatic.character_feel: dramatically cute — chubby cartoon skeletons being intense in an endearingly funny way
cute_dramatic.line_weight: thick bold outlines, dramatic weight variation for emphasis
cute_dramatic.color_mode: monochrome dark flat base with single neon magenta highlight spot
cute_dramatic.shadow_style: bold flat dark shadow, kept simple on character shapes
cute_dramatic.expression_style: intense glowing hollow eye sockets, single dramatic teardrop, serious brow-equivalent skull tilt
cute_dramatic.whitespace: intentional dark negative space creating emotional weight

telephone-signal-pop.name: Telephone Signal Pop Cartoon
telephone-signal-pop.description: Telephone-signal-pop custom cartoon style with warm phone-signal pulse, ajaeng lead shimmer, spacious calm, and a gentle uplifting hook.
telephone-signal-pop.prompt_anchor: warm telephone-signal-pop cartoon style, thick rounded black outlines, flat warm cel colors, chubby rounded skeleton characters surrounded by soft telephone pulse rings, tiny signal-wave sparkle effects, subtle ajaeng string shimmer trails, spacious gentle comic panel composition, warm neon magenta and amber glow accents, original cartoon skeleton band
telephone-signal-pop.character_feel: gentle chubby cartoon skeletons following a warm distant signal, hopeful and softly rhythmic
telephone-signal-pop.line_weight: medium-thick rounded outlines with soft pulse accents
telephone-signal-pop.color_mode: warm flat colors, amber signal glow, gentle neon magenta highlights, no harsh contrast
telephone-signal-pop.shadow_style: soft flat shadow with warm signal-pulse glow
telephone-signal-pop.expression_style: soft glowing hollow eye sockets, tiny signal-wave sparkle marks, gentle hopeful skull tilt
telephone-signal-pop.background_density: spacious simple cyberpunk stage with telephone-line pulse motifs and subtle ajaeng shimmer
telephone-signal-pop.whitespace: generous breathing space, warm signal rhythm, calm uplifting hook emphasis
